{{Quote|Flight Ops, launch TIE Interceptor squadron Alpha.|Lumiya|<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire">{{GalaxyCite|3|Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire}}</ref>}}
'''Alpha Squadron''', or '''Alpha Squad''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] unit that was employed in various duties and battles throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Imp-stub}}

==History==
During the construction of the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], Alpha Squadron was assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] at [[Despayre]]. The squadron was later transferred to the Death Star as it progressively became operational. When [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] requested provisions of the Imperial [[Regent/Legends|stewardess]] [[Ysanne Isard]] in the wake of the [[Nagai–Tof War]], Alpha Squadron was transferred to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Revenant (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Revenant'']] within [[Lumiya's fleet|her fleet]], and participated in an [[Assault on Epsilon Nine|assault]] on the [[Communications Research Station|Communications Research]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Epsilon Nine]].

==Members==
On board the ''Steel Talon'':
*[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Villian Dance]] {{C|[[ST-1-1]]}}
*[[Benjo]] {{C|[[ST-1-2]]}}
*[[Raar Anyell]]
*[[Lude]]

On board the Death Star:
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Nond Kendo]]
